response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video, identified two distinct song performances with a transition. 2. Identified 'JANE DOE' (Kenshi Yonezu) and 'Gaze on Me!' (Erika Masaki / Tomohiro Nakado) via on-screen text. 3. Confirmed performers: IRyS/Okayu for song 1, IRyS/Okayu/Korone for song 2. 4. Searched for lyrics for both songs. 5. Constructed JSON with scene breakdown and lyrics.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a two-song musical performance by hololive VTubers. The first song is 'JANE DOE' performed by IRyS and Nekomata Okayu, followed by a transition, and then 'Gaze on Me!' performed by IRyS, Nekomata Okayu, and Inugami Korone.

scenes.description: The performance of 'JANE DOE' begins. The performers, IRyS and Nekomata Okayu, sing and dance in a stadium-like setting. Text 'Lyrics, Music: 米津玄師' appears on screen.

なんて少しだけ夢をみてしまっただけ
つま先に月明かり 花束の香り 指に触れる指
さよなら もう行かなきゃ 何もかも忘れて

痛むごとに血が流れて落ちていく

錆びたプールに放たれていく金魚 靴箱の中隠した林檎
萎びた君の肌に残る傷跡 犬のように泳いだ迷子
どこにいるの (ここにいるよ) 何をしているの (ずっと見てるよ)
この世を間違いで満たそう 側にいてよ 遊びに行こうよ

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
As if in this world, only you and I remain
Yet in a dream, I allowed myself a moment of longing
Moonlight spills upon the instep, the scent of flowers drifts faintly
Fingertips lightly touch fingertips
Goodbye, it's time for me to go
And forget everything
Barefoot, step by step, on shards of glass
Each step is excruciating, leaving pools of blood
Please, follow these crimson footprints
Come find me
Goldfish released into a rust-stained swimming pool
And the apple hidden in the shoe locker
The scar carved into your withered skin
A lost child struggling like a drowning dog
Where are you? (I'm right here)
What are you doing? (I've been watching over you)
Let fallacies overflow this world
Stay with me, let's play once more
Where in the world are you?
Barefoot on shards of glass, taking step after step
Each step stings unbearably, leaving pools of blood behind
Please, follow these crimson footprints
Come find me
As if in this world, only you and I remain
Yet in my dreams, I indulged in a fleeting moment

scenes.description: A brief transition segment where the performers move between songs. No vocal music is playing.
The performance of 'Gaze on Me!' begins. The performers, IRyS, Nekomata Okayu, and Inugami Korone, sing and dance. Text 'Gaze on Me! Lyrics: 真崎エリカ Music: 中土智博' appears.
scenes.original_artist: 真崎エリカ, 中土智博

走れ 夏の方へ！

Please, Gaze on Me！

The path to your dream is just straightforward
This sight, forbidden to anyone
Please, Gaze on Me!
Surely, it's the start of a fantastic time

(La la la la la la...I'm the heroine)
(La la la la la la... Give yours to me)

(Surely, it's the start of a fantastic time)
Are you ready to burn, everyone?
Agreeing, even heat haze is heating up

Retreating is a no-no
Once the gate opens, instantly a drama occurs
Run, towards where summer is!
Shake it! Summer girls, the first second you start galloping
